description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional lounge upholstered in a deep burgundy leather or leather-like material. The lounge features three main seating sections with plush, attached seat and back cushions, providing ample seating for multiple people. The backrest is gently curved and segmented into three main sections, each with subtle horizontal stitching for added visual interest. Both ends of the lounge have wide, padded armrests that curve outward, enhancing comfort and style. The base of the lounge is fully upholstered, with only small, low-profile black feet visible at the corners. The overall design is modern and inviting, suitable for urban public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or communal lounges.
description: A large, L-shaped burgundy leather sectional lounge with plush, segmented cushions and wide, curved armrests. Modern, fully upholstered design with low-profile feet.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, three main seat sections, segmented backrest, and both wide, curved armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest and the depth of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the continuous upholstered base and the gentle curve of the backrest.
description_view_3: Rear angled view emphasizing the wraparound backrest and the corner seat section.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached seat cushions and three segmented back cushions, all integrated and plush, with a corner cushion at the intersection.
attribute_backrest_design: Curved, medium-height backrest segmented into three sections with subtle horizontal stitching and gentle contouring.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present on both ends, wide, curved, and fully padded.
attribute_leg_style: Short, low-profile black legs, minimally visible, likely made of plastic or metal, positioned at the corners.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid burgundy color with smooth leather texture and subtle horizontal stitching on the backrest.
